summary: Iteration 79 - REDD+ Tracking System and USSD Carbon Calculator Updates Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: USSD Carbon Calculator no longer shows CO2/ha formula or ARS percentage in results, questions include concept explanations, 'Notions importantes' card with 5 explanations present on web page, REDD+ Tracking page with form/historique/stats tabs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: USSD Carbon Calculator questions include concept explanations (e.g., 'La superficie de votre exploitation determine le potentiel de sequestration carbone')
PASS: USSD Carbon Calculator result does NOT show CO2/ha formula
PASS: USSD Carbon Calculator result does NOT show ARS percentage (shows 'Niveau ARS: Argent' not 'Niveau ARS: Argent (XX%)')
PASS: USSD Carbon Calculator result shows Score, Prime estimee, and ARS level with conseil
PASS: Web Carbon Calculator page (/farmer/prime-carbone) has 'Notions importantes' card with data-testid='concepts-card'
PASS: 'Notions importantes' card contains all 5 explanations: Score Carbone, Agroforesterie, ARS 1000, REDD+, Compost
PASS: GET /api/redd/tracking/practices-list returns 21 practices in 5 categories (agroforesterie, zero_deforestation, gestion_sols, restauration, tracabilite)
PASS: POST /api/redd/tracking/visit requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
PASS: POST /api/redd/tracking/visit creates visit with redd_score, redd_level, conformity_pct
PASS: GET /api/redd/tracking/visits requires authentication and returns visits list
PASS: GET /api/redd/tracking/stats requires authentication and returns total_visits, avg_conformity, avg_redd_score, level_distribution
PASS: REDD+ Tracking page (/redd/tracking) loads with data-testid='redd-tracking-page'
PASS: REDD+ Tracking page has 3 tabs: Nouvelle fiche, Historique, Statistiques
PASS: REDD+ Tracking form shows all 21 practices organized by category with toggle buttons
PASS: REDD+ Tracking Historique tab shows visit history with farmer name, date, score, level
PASS: REDD+ Tracking Statistiques tab shows KPIs (Visites, Score moyen, Conformite) and level distribution
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test REDD+ tracking visit via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified 3 new features: (1) USSD Carbon Calculator no longer shows CO2/ha formula or ARS percentage in results, questions now include concept explanations. (2) Web Carbon Calculator page has 'Notions importantes' card with 5 concept explanations. (3) REDD+ Tracking system fully functional with API endpoints (practices-list, visit, visits, stats) and web page at /redd/tracking with form, historique, and stats tabs. Mobile screens (REDDGuideScreen, REDDTrackingFormScreen) are React Native and cannot be browser-tested but their registration in AppContent.js was verified by code inspection.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

ussd_carbon_calculator_updates.example_result: Score: 8.3/10, Prime estimee: 232,579 FCFA/an, Niveau ARS: Argent

mobile_screens_code_verified.HomeScreen_navigation_fixed: Lines 160, 254 now navigate to REDDGuide instead of USSDCarbon/USSDFullSimulator
